_comment_1: Version-controlled source of truth for the pdfcraftai.com Tier-3 geo-block WAF Custom Rule.
_comment_2: Apply via Cloudflare dashboard (Security -> WAF -> Custom rules) or via the API -- see docs/ops/CLOUDFLARE_GEOBLOCK_SETUP.md for both paths.
_comment_3: The _comment_* keys are ignored by the Cloudflare API (which rejects unknown top-level fields cleanly); they exist only for git-readability.
_comment_4: When applying via API: strip the _comment_* keys first, or feed only the 'rule' object to the POST body.
_comment_5: Authoritative policy source: docs/GEO_LAUNCH_POLICY.md sec 3.1. ISO subdivision legend: UA-43 Crimea, UA-40 Sevastopol, UA-14 Donetsk, UA-09 Luhansk, UA-65 Kherson, UA-23 Zaporizhzhia.
_comment_6: Regulatory basis: OFAC EO 13685 (Crimea + Sevastopol, 2014); OFAC EO 14065 (DPR/LPR Feb 2022; Kherson + Zaporizhzhia Sept 2022).
_comment_7: Review cadence: quarterly (next scheduled 2026-07-21). If OFAC delists or adds a sanctioned region, edit the expression and redeploy.
